{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032301535559A6F3000997A9E1C5C6"}"},"total":7},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7511980274126390041","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"一会第一人称一会第三人称😎","text_exts":[{"e":6,"s":2,"text":"第一人称","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E7%AC%AC%E4%B8%80%E4%BA%BA%E7%A7%B0&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774202035A9E1C5C6%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227511980274126390041%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227325631884803722302%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E7%AC%AC%E4%B8%80%E4%BA%BA%E7%A7%B0%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1749025264,"group_id":"7325631884803722302","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N07nOMnXHhfLqG3lkA5Yf50=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"50847100173","user_name":"爱吃秘制烤羊排的碧修"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"50847100173","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7325631884803722302","book_info":{"abstract":"别名《八大界》
这个世界，以异能为王，拥有了异能，才是踏入这个世界的第一步。修行至顶峰的至强者，才可能拥有自己想要的一切。
在读大学生应无悔见义勇为，被混混连捅六七刀，救护车又因为意外坠入海中。
正当以为一切都结束的时候，应无悔发现有一扇大门，他用尽浑身解数，都无法逃离那扇门而后就被吸了进去。
醒来发现在一座浮空岛上，还没来得及打招呼，就被踹了下去。再次醒来的时候，发现自己已经来到了另一个世界。[群像+无系统+无套路+贴近现实+努力脱变+克服一切艰难险阻+轻松治愈+偶尔幽默+平凡无能主角逆袭！]
